wins_analysis: No wins today as the system generated zero recommendations. The AI module was unavailable and the zone score fallback failed to produce any qualifying setups, resulting in a completely inactive day.
losses_analysis: No losses today since no trades were placed. The primary failure is systemic — the fallback mechanism produced zero actionable setups despite a clear trending_down regime that should have offered short-side opportunities at supply zones.
regime_impact: Today's trending_down regime with ADX=25 and Nifty -1.0% was ideal for short-side supply zone trades. The system completely missed this opportunity because the AI was unavailable and the fallback zone scoring was too restrictive or misconfigured to generate any recommendations in a bearish environment.

improvements.action: Lower the zone_score_threshold for fallback mode from current level to 60 (or whatever produces at least 3-5 candidates) specifically when ADX>20 and regime is trending_down
improvements.reason: Zero setups in a strong trending day means the fallback thresholds are too conservative — a -1.0% Nifty day with ADX=25 should have multiple supply zone short candidates

improvements.action: Add a dedicated short-side supply zone scanner that activates when regime=trending_down AND Nifty change < -0.5%, scanning for stocks approaching recent resistance with bearish candle patterns
improvements.reason: The system had zero output on a day perfectly suited for shorts, indicating the fallback lacks directional bias logic

improvements.action: Implement an AI availability health check at 8:30 AM IST — if AI is down, immediately switch to a pre-configured rule-based strategy using top 10 Nifty stocks by volume with supply/demand zone proximity ranking
improvements.reason: AI unavailability caused total inactivity; a deterministic backup ensures the bot always has minimum participation

improvements.action: Pre-compute supply zones for HDFCBANK, RELIANCE, INFY, TCS, ICICIBANK on the weekly timeframe and store them so fallback mode can instantly match price proximity without needing AI inference
improvements.reason: These high-liquidity names almost certainly had tradeable supply zones on a -1.0% day but were missed due to system inactivity

improvements.action: Set VIX<15 + trending regime as a 'high confidence short' flag — tomorrow if VIX stays near 13.6 and downtrend continues, bias all setups SHORT with tighter targets (1:1.5 R:R) for quicker fills
improvements.reason: Low VIX (13.6) with trending_down means orderly selling — shorts with modest targets have high probability of fill in such regimes

tomorrow_focus: If downtrend continues (watch if Nifty opens below today's low), prioritize SHORT setups on HDFCBANK, RELIANCE, INFY near their daily supply zones using the fallback scanner with lowered thresholds — ensure at least 3-5 recommendations are generated regardless of AI availability.

symbol_notes.HDFCBANK.NS: Heavyweight likely broke support on -1% Nifty day — watch for retest of breakdown level as supply zone for short tomorrow
symbol_notes.RELIANCE.NS: Monitor if price approaches 15-min supply zone formed during today's sell-off for continuation short
symbol_notes.INFY.NS: IT sector typically leads in downtrends — check for supply zone near today's opening price for short entry
symbol_notes.TCS.NS: Similar to INFY, look for rejection at intraday resistance formed today
